events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the legendary Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rocking! Happy Birthday to the iconic Mick Jagger. What's your ultimate Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: Video Star
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens! Did video really kill the radio star? We'll let you be the judge.

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 22 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. What an album! What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival of Music & Art took place in 1969, an iconic moment in counterculture history.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. What an era!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of 'The King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering The King today. Elvis Presley's music continues to define generations. What's your favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur today. His impact on music and culture is undeniable, even 30 years on.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix today. His influence on guitarists is still felt across the world.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Walk This Way
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous ever!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the brilliant Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with that unmistakable voice.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite Oasis or solo track?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 'Imagine all the people, living life in peace...' John Lennon's 'Imagine' was released this day in 1975. A message that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple dropped a game-changer that put 1,000 songs in your pocket!

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the first Bond film premiere in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond and what's the best Bond theme song? Let us know!

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles legend John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy icon John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedy genius.
